allow:
Bash(# Reference server: option 1, port 4444 \(blank\), dummy opponent Y
\(echo 1 && echo """" && echo ""Y""\))

Bash(# Keep stdin open with tail -f
\(echo 1; echo """"; echo ""Y""; sleep infinity\))

Bash(# Try with printf and explicit CRLF for Windows
\(printf ""1\\r\\n\\r\\nY\\r\\n""; cat\))

Bash(# Use tail to keep stdin open after providing input
{ printf ""1\\n\\nY\\n""; tail -f /dev/null; })

Bash(# Start your server with proper input piping
\(echo """" ; cat\))
Bash(# Kill any lingering Java processes first, then start server taskkill /F /IM java.exe ; sleep 1; \(echo 4444\))
